---
title: "Análisis Bivariado"
---

# Cuantitativo vs Categórico

## Librerías

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
```

## Cargar el dataset

```{python}
movies_extended = data.movies().dropna(subset=['Major_Genre'])

movies_extended.head()
```


## Histogram

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X(
        'Worldwide_Gross',
        bin=alt.BinParams(
            maxbins=30
        )
    ),
    alt.Y('count()'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre')
)
```

## Density Plot

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).transform_density(
    'Worldwide_Gross',
    groupby=['Major_Genre'],
    as_=['Worldwide_Gross','density']
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre')
).interactive()
```

## Bar chart

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('mean(Worldwide_Gross)'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre')
)
```

## Variante con Tick

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    tooltip=['Title:N']
).interactive()
```

## Heatmap

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X(
        'Worldwide_Gross',
        bin=alt.BinParams(
            maxbins=10
        )
    ),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Color('count()')
)
```

## Bloxplot

```{python}

alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Size('count()')
)
```


# Cuantitativo vs Cuantitativo

## Scatterplot

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('IMDB_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating'),
    tooltip=['Title:N','IMDB_Rating','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating']
)
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X('Production_Budget'),
    alt.Y('Worldwide_Gross'),
    tooltip=['Title:N','IMDB_Rating','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating', 'Production_Budget','Worldwide_Gross']
)
```

## Heatmap

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('Production_Budget',bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=100)),
    alt.Y('Worldwide_Gross',bin=alt.BinParams(maxbins=100)),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
)

```

# Categórico vs Categórico

## Bar chart
